steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity between Svanoe’s game and Dorn’s game. The shared trait in the notes is that both designers created a board game inspired by a novel — a work of fiction.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Dorn created a board game inspired by the novel Journey to the Center of the Earth.: Mentions only Dorn’s game; no comparison to Svanoe. ✗
  • Choice B — Both Svanoe's and Dorn's games were inspired by works of fiction.: Explicitly names both designers and states their shared characteristic. ✓
  • Choice C — The novel Journey to the Center of the Earth is featured in a board game.: Mentions only Dorn’s source novel; no comparison to Svanoe. ✗
  • Choice D — A game designed by Svanoe features characters and events from the novel Pride and Prejudice.: Mentions only Svanoe’s game; no comparison to Dorn. ✗
That is the correct answer.
